MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DAVID WILLIAMS, ESQ., 510.271.0826, FOR PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION.
BRIAN MERTES, ESQ., 330.456.8340 AND JERRY FINCH, ESQ., 415.362.7126, FOR DEFENDANT 31, INC.

RULING: matter discussed. the court grants PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To 31 Incorporated. Order signed in open court. consent judgment signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CYNTHIA SOLIMAN, ESQ., ERICKSEN ARBUTHNOT, 415.362.7126, FOR DEFENDANT 31 INCORPORATED; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT 31 INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is granted. No opposition filed and good cause appearing to grant Mr. Mertes' application per California Rule of Court 9.40(c). Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
